overall.description: First-person exploration through a cyberpunk-style night market, approaching a food stall and entering the back kitchen area. High-quality game engine footage featuring neon-lit industrial architecture and atmospheric lighting.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a semi-covered cyberpunk night market with neon-lit food stalls lining the right side. The concrete walkway is bordered by a green metal railing on the left. Various NPCs stand near the stalls, and the target food stall with digital menu screens becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall service counter and kitchen entry corridor

dark doorway leading to the back kitchen corridor

segments.scene_description: Approaching the target food stall and moving past the service counter where a vendor in red is working. The scene transitions from the open market into a narrow enclosed kitchen corridor through a dark doorway. The digital menu screens are now visible overhead as the camera enters the back kitchen area.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow kitchen corridor with cooking stations and storage

events.description: slows down to observe the cooking station with frying pans and food preparation
turns around and begins moving back toward the kitchen entrance

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow kitchen corridor, observing cooking equipment and food preparation areas

entered.detail: stovetop with multiple frying pans and food patties being cooked
metal shelving units with cooking supplies and ingredients
metal ventilation hood above the cooking area

segments.scene_description: Navigating the narrow enclosed kitchen corridor with low artificial lighting. A cook in a yellow jacket works at the cooking station with frying pans and food patties. Metal shelving lines the walls, and an exhaust hood is visible above. The camera explores the space, pausing to observe the cooking area before turning to move back toward the kitchen entrance, with the digital menu screens visible in the distance through the doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a vibrant, neon-lit night market into the dim, industrial confines of a food stall's back kitchen. It begins by gliding along a concrete walkway bordered by a green metal railing, passing various NPCs and glowing food stalls that line the right side. As the camera approaches a specific stall with digital menu screens, it moves past a vendor in red and transitions through a dark doorway, shifting from the open market into a narrow, enclosed corridor. The scene then opens into the kitchen area where low artificial lighting illuminates a cook in a yellow jacket working at a station with frying pans and metal shelving. Finally, the camera explores the cramped space beneath an exhaust hood before turning back toward the entrance, where the digital menus remain visible in the distance.
